member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorConversation
member.summary: Represents a learner-owned course tutor conversation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorConversation.TryAddExchange(System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Adds a complete user/reply pair atomically to the aggregate.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorConversationStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle of an AI Tutor conversation.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorConversationStatus.Active
member.summary: The conversation accepts new learner messages.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorConversationStatus.Archived
member.summary: The conversation is retained as read-only history.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorMessage
member.summary: Represents one ordered visible tutor message.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorMessageRole
member.summary: Defines persisted, user-visible AI Tutor message authors.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.AiTutor.AiTutorMessageRole.Assistant
member.summary: The local AI Tutor authored the message.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity
member.summary: Provides audit metadata and optimistic concurrency state for a domain entity.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp at which the entity was created.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the user who created the entity, when available.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.UpdatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp of the most recent update.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.UpdatedBy
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the user who most recently updated the entity, when available.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.RowVersion
member.summary: Gets the SQL Server rowversion used for optimistic concurrency checks.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Entity
member.summary: Provides strongly typed identity for persisted domain entities.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Entity.DomainEvents
member.summary: Gets a read-only view of domain events raised by this entity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Entity.AddDomainEvent(LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Adds a domain event raised by this entity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Entity.RemoveDomainEvent(LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Removes a domain event from this entity when it is present.
member.returns: when the event was removed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Entity.ClearDomainEvents
member.summary: Removes all accumulated domain events from this entity.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Events.DomainEvent
member.summary: Provides immutable identity and occurrence metadata for a domain event.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Events.DomainEvent.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new domain event with a time-ordered identifier and current UTC timestamp.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Identifies an immutable fact that occurred within the domain model.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEvent.OccurredOnUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp at which the event occurred.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.ISoftDelete
member.summary: Identifies an entity whose deletion is represented as retained audit state.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.ISoftDelete.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the entity has been deleted.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.ISoftDelete.DeletedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp at which the entity was deleted.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Common.ISoftDelete.DeletedBy
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the user who deleted the entity, when available.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course.SkillId
member.summary: Gets the stable skill identifier used for instructor qualification.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course.TryPublish
member.summary: Publishes a Draft course and treats an already Published course as success.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course.TryArchive
member.summary: Archives a Published course and treats an already Archived course as success.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course.TrySetSkill(System.Guid)
member.summary: Associates the course with a stable skill.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course.TryDelete
member.summary: Prepares a Draft course for repository deletion.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.CourseStatus
member.summary: Defines the supported course lifecycle states.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.CourseStatus.Draft
member.summary: The course is editable and not publicly available.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.CourseStatus.Published
member.summary: The course is published and no longer editable.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.CourseStatus.Archived
member.summary: The previously published course is archived.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Events.CourseCreatedDomainEvent
member.summary: Represents the domain fact that a course was created.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Events.CourseCreatedDomainEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The identifier of the created course.
The normalized title of the created course.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Events.CourseCreatedDomainEvent.CourseId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the created course.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Events.CourseCreatedDomainEvent.Title
member.summary: Gets the normalized title of the created course.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Events.CourseDeletedDomainEvent
member.summary: Represents deletion of a Draft course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Events.CourseDeletedDomainEvent.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Represents deletion of a Draft course.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Exceptions.DuplicateCourseSlugException
member.summary: Represents a database-enforced duplicate course slug.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.SlugNormalizer
member.summary: Normalizes course slugs to lowercase kebab-case.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Enrollment
member.summary: Represents one student's enrollment in a course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Enrollment.TryComplete(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Completes an enrolled or in-progress course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Enrollment.TryWithdraw(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Withdraws an enrolled or in-progress course.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.EnrollmentStatus.Enrolled
member.summary: The student is enrolled but has not started.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.EnrollmentStatus.InProgress
member.summary: The student has started the course.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.EnrollmentStatus.Withdrawn
member.summary: The student withdrew from the course.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Exceptions.DuplicateActiveEnrollmentException
member.summary: Represents a duplicate active enrollment constraint violation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Exceptions.DuplicateActiveEnrollmentException.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Represents a duplicate active enrollment constraint violation.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Exceptions.EnrollmentConcurrencyException
member.summary: Represents an optimistic enrollment concurrency conflict.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Enrollments.Exceptions.EnrollmentConcurrencyException.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Represents an optimistic enrollment concurrency conflict.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Learning.LessonProgress
member.summary: Tracks one student's progress through one lesson in an enrollment.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Learning.LessonProgress.LastAccessedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the most recent access time.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Learning.LessonProgress.Access(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Records access without regressing completed progress.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Learning.LessonProgressStatus
member.summary: Defines learner progress through a published lesson.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Learning.LessonProgressStatus.NotStarted
member.summary: Lesson has not yet been opened.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Learning.LessonProgressStatus.InProgress
member.summary: Lesson has been opened but not completed.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Exceptions.DuplicateLessonOrderException
member.summary: Represents a duplicate active lesson order within a course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Exceptions.DuplicateLessonOrderException.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Represents a duplicate active lesson order within a course.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Exceptions.LessonConcurrencyException
member.summary: Represents an optimistic-concurrency conflict for a lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Exceptions.LessonConcurrencyException.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Represents an optimistic-concurrency conflict for a lesson.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Lesson.MarkdownContent
member.summary: Gets Markdown source for an article.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Lesson.ExternalUrl
member.summary: Gets the normalized external source URL.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Lessons.Lesson.TryDelete
member.summary: Prepares a Draft lesson for soft deletion.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuestionType
member.summary: Defines supported automatically scored quiz question types.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuestionType.MultipleChoice
member.summary: Requires an exact selected answer set.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuestionType.TrueFalse
member.summary: Requires one of two true/false answers.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz
member.summary: Represents a course assessment authored before publication.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz.IsRequiredForCourseCompletion
member.summary: Gets whether passing blocks course completion.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz.IsInstructorAssessment
member.summary: Gets whether this quiz can qualify instructors.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz.SkillId
member.summary: Gets the skill qualified by this assessment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz.TryAddQuestion(LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizQuestion)
member.summary: Adds a question while the quiz is a Draft.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz.TryRemoveQuestion(System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a question while the quiz is a Draft.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.Quiz.TryConfigureInstructorAssessment(System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Configures a draft as an instructor assessment for one skill.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAnswerChoice
member.summary: Represents one answer choice authored for a quiz question.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAnswerChoice.IsCorrect
member.summary: Gets whether the choice is correct.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttempt
member.summary: Represents one owned, server-scored quiz attempt.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttempt.Passed
member.summary: Gets whether the passing threshold was met.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer
member.summary: Preserves one submitted answer and its server scoring snapshot.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer.QuestionText
member.summary: Gets the submitted question text snapshot.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer.QuestionType
member.summary: Gets the submitted question type snapshot.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer.SelectedChoiceIds
member.summary: Gets the selected answer identifiers as JSON.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer.ChoiceSnapshot
member.summary: Gets the answer-choice snapshot as JSON.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer.IsCorrect
member.summary: Gets whether the exact answer was correct.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptAnswer.Create(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizQuestion,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a server-scored immutable answer snapshot.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptStatus.InProgress
member.summary: The learner may still submit answers.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAttemptStatus.Submitted
member.summary: The server scored and finalized the attempt.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizQuestion
member.summary: Represents one ordered, automatically scored quiz question.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizQuestion.IsActive
member.summary: Gets whether the question appears in new attempts.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizQuestion.HasValidAnswers(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizAnswerChoice})
member.summary: Validates choices for the configured type.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizStatus.Draft
member.summary: Quiz is editable and unavailable to learners.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizStatus.Published
member.summary: Quiz is available to eligible learners.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Domain.Quizzes.QuizStatus.Archived
member.summary: Quiz is retained but unavailable for new attempts.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository
member.summary: Defines persistence operations required by course management.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a tracked course by identifier.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository.GetByIdReadOnlyAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an untracked course by identifier.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository.GetPublishedBySlugAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an untracked published course by slug.

member.summary: Returns a filtered course page and total matching count.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository.SlugExistsAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Determines whether a non-deleted course owns a normalized slug.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository.Remove(LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course)
member.summary: Marks a course for soft deletion.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ICourseRepository.SetOriginalRowVersion(LearningPortal.Domain.Courses.Course,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sets the client-provided original rowversion used for concurrency checks.

member.summary: Gets a student's enrollment for a course.

member.summary: Gets a filtered student enrollment page.

member.summary: Gets a filtered course enrollment page.

member.summary: Gets active enrollment course identifiers for a student.

member.summary: Gets active enrollments for selected courses.

member.summary: Gets tracked eligibility for one user and skill.

member.summary: Lists eligible records for a skill read-only.

member.summary: Gets the user's best submitted qualifying attempt for a skill.

member.summary: Provides persistence operations needed by learner progress.

member.summary: Gets tracked progress for an enrollment lesson.

member.summary: Gets read-only progress records for an enrollment.

member.summary: Gets published lessons for a course in display order.

member.summary: Gets published lessons for selected courses.

member.summary: Removes a lesson through soft delete.

member.summary: Atomically swaps a lesson with a target order.

member.summary: Describes an atomic lesson reorder result.

member.summary: Gets an attempt and answer snapshots.

member.summary: Gets the student's active attempt for a quiz.

member.summary: Gets the number of started attempts.

member.summary: Checks whether an enrollment passed a quiz.

member.summary: Gets a quiz and ordered authoring graph.

member.summary: Gets required published quizzes for course completion.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.IRepository`1
member.summary: Defines asynchronous persistence operations for an aggregate.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.IRepository`1.AddAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds an entity to the current unit of work.

member.summary: Gets an active skill by identifier.

member.summary: Gets a skill by normalized slug.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.ISkillRepository.GetByNameAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a skill by its preserved display name.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Repositories.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Coordinates atomic persistence of aggregate changes.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.InstructorEligibility
member.summary: Records a user's highest earned qualification for one skill.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.InstructorEligibility.QualifyingQuizId
member.summary: Gets the quiz that produced the best score.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.InstructorEligibility.QualifiedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets when qualification was first earned.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.InstructorEligibility.IsEligible
member.summary: Gets whether the qualification remains active.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.InstructorEligibility.Create(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Decimal,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Creates a qualification from a qualifying submitted result.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.InstructorEligibility.TryUpdateBest(System.Guid,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Updates only when a higher qualifying result is supplied.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.Skill
member.summary: Represents a stable learning and instructor-qualification skill.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Domain.Skills.Skill.IsActive
member.summary: Gets whether the skill may be used for new qualifications.
